title: Brevo vs Ghost (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Brevo vs Ghost: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Brevo and Ghost comes down to your specific use case. Brevo is built for transactional email and multi-channel marketing, while Ghost targets writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

comparison_table.tool_b: Writers And Creators Running Paid Newsletter Businesses

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on transactional email and multi-channel marketing
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Brevo wins for transactional email and multi-channel marketing, while Ghost is stronger for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or Ghost?
faq.a: Ghost starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Ghost to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
